title: Why is HasanAbi barred from entering the UK? Twitch star claims visa was revoked ahead of major appearances
summary_full: Twitch streamer HasanAbi has claimed that the United Kingdom revoked his visa, preventing him from attending several planned events and appearances in the country. Speaking during a livestream, he criticized the decision and linked it to broader political issues. The controversy quickly gained attention online, with supporters and critics debating his claims while questions remain about the circumstances behind the reported visa revocation.
